name: Chicken and Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the vegetables at the bottom of the crock pot.
2. Put the chicken on top of the vegetables.
3. Add a small amount of liquid (between 1/4 cup and 1/2 cup, more if needed).
4. Add minced garlic, salt, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper to taste.
5. Cook on low for about 8 hours.
6. Turn the setting to high.
7. Adjust seasonings as necessary.
